parameters.description: Type IIS restriction enzymes acceptable for Golden Gate one-pot assembly in the Engler protocol family.

citations.authors: Engler C, Kandzia R, Marillonnet S
citations.title: A one pot, one step, precision cloning method with high throughput capability
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed canonical Golden Gate Type IIS one-pot method paper. BsaI is the canonical enzyme; BsmBI is the close analogue used in MoClo.

parameters.description: Ligase required for Golden Gate cycling assembly.

citations.authors: Engler C, Kandzia R, Marillonnet S
citations.title: A one pot, one step, precision cloning method with high throughput capability
citations.tier_justification: Golden Gate as originally described uses T4 DNA ligase co-incubated with BsaI.

parameters.description: Incubation temperature for the BsaI / BsmBI digest step during Golden Gate cycling.

citations.title: NEB BsaI-HFv2 product page (R3733)
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative vendor product page listing 37 C as the BsaI optimal incubation temperature.

parameters.description: Incubation temperature for the T4 DNA ligase step during Golden Gate cycling.

citations.title: NEB T4 DNA Ligase Protocol (M0202)
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative NEB protocol supporting 16 C as the canonical T4 ligase ligation temperature.

parameters.description: Minimum number of 37 C / 16 C cycles for Golden Gate assembly of 4 fragments.

citations.authors: Engler C, Kandzia R, Marillonnet S
citations.title: A one pot, one step, precision cloning method with high throughput capability
citations.tier_justification: Original Golden Gate paper reports 25 cycles of 37 C / 16 C as giving efficient assembly.

parameters.description: Temperature used to heat-kill BsaI and T4 ligase at the end of Golden Gate cycling.

citations.title: NEB BsaI-HFv2 product page (R3733)
citations.tier_justification: Authoritative NEB reference: BsaI-HFv2 heat-inactivates at 80 C; BsaI-HF and the NEB Golden Gate Assembly Mix kit recommend 60 C for 5 min. 60 C is used here as the standard in-kit heat-kill step.

parameters.description: Number of DNA fragments supplied to the Golden Gate-01 task (1 backbone + 3 inserts).

citations.authors: Engler C, Kandzia R, Marillonnet S
citations.title: A one pot, one step, precision cloning method with high throughput capability
citations.tier_justification: Original Golden Gate paper validates 4-fragment directional assembly as the canonical demonstration; MoClo scales to more fragments but 4 is the baseline.

parameters.description: Baseline fraction of transformants that contain the correctly assembled construct under optimal Golden Gate conditions.

citations.authors: Engler C, Kandzia R, Marillonnet S
citations.title: A one pot, one step, precision cloning method with high throughput capability
citations.tier_justification: Original Golden Gate paper reports >80% correct assembly for 4-fragment one-pot reactions under optimal cycling.
